Staff Electrical Engineer (f/m/d)

Location

Munich

Employment Type

Full time

Location Type

Hybrid

Department

Product & Technology

Compensation

  • Compensation Range €90K – €100K • €40K – €80K Equity

At Orbem, pay bands are transparent. Every role sits within a job level with a defined base salary range, benchmarked against market data and applied company-wide.

 

Total compensation is base salary plus equity in the form of stock options. The two are linked: more base means less equity, and the reverse. You choose where you land between them.

 

  • Base salary: tied to your job level, benchmarked, consistent company-wide

  • Equity (ESOP): purchase shares at a fixed price and share in Orbem's growth as it scales

 

You'll get full details during the hiring process.
